name: Maverick Silens 2X Profile

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C47466CF-AAD1-45EC-8DF7-0D15B960EB27

comment: Powerful member of our award-winning Silens range. 760W 94+ CRILED source in an uncompromising design that offers the highest quality of light, flawless 16-bit dimming with selectable red shift and dimming curves, precise 4-blade shutter framing, and accurate color rendering. Completely fanless operation makes this totally silent fixture ideal for the most demanding theatre and studio applications. Featuring dual gobo wheels (rotating + static), variable CMY + CTO and a full effects wheelhouse.  Control via Art-Net, sACN, DMX, RDM or CRMX.

gwSpecs.description: Powerful member of our award-winning Silens range. 760W 94+ CRILED source in an uncompromising design that offers the highest quality of light, flawless 16-bit dimming with selectable red shift and dimming curves, precise 4-blade shutter framing, and accurate color rendering. Completely fanless operation makes this totally silent fixture ideal for the most demanding theatre and studio applications. Featuring dual gobo wheels (rotating + static), variable CMY + CTO and a full effects wheelhouse.  Control via Art-Net, sACN, DMX, RDM or CRMX.
